quick_skim.title: From Observation to Intervention: A Causal Audit of Expert Importance in Mixture-of-Experts Models
quick_skim.abstract: Interpretability methods routinely use population-level summary statistics over observed model behaviour to license claims about the effects of targeted interventions on specific computations; in Pearl's terms, they treat rung-1 associational evidence as if it supported rung-2 interventional conclusions, a move whose validity is rarely tested. We examine one concrete instance: the use of routing statistics in Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) pruning, where utilization rates, activation norms, and routing weight distributions are treated as predictors of which experts can be removed without functional cost. A token-level interventional audit across three high-redundancy MoE architectures (OLMoE-1B-7B-0924, Qwen1.5-MoE-A2.7B, DeepSeek-V2-Lite) finds no observational metric predicts causal expert importance after multiple-comparison correction in any model, with effect sizes below Cohen's $d = 0.17$ across all 60 metric-layer combinations. A per-token routing weight control rules out insufficient power, recovering a single Bonferroni-significant signal at OLMoE's final MoE layer ($d = +0.231$, $p = 0.0013$). Existing pruning methods succeed in this regime not by identifying dispensable experts but because early-layer redundancy renders most selection criteria interchangeable. Our results provide an explicit counterexample to the common inferential step from population-level observational summaries to token-level interventional claims about expert importance, and illustrate how interventional audits can calibrate the evidential standards for interpretability claims.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: audits expert importance in MoE models for pruning, directly supporting efficient inference
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 审计MoE模型中的专家重要性以支持剪枝，直接有助于高效推理
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 审计MoE模型中的专家重要性以支持剪枝，直接有助于高效推理
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 审计MoE模型中的专家重要性以支持剪枝，直接有助于高效推理
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Performs token-level interventional audit on MoE models to validate routing statistics for pruning, tested on OLMoE-1B-7B-0924, Qwen1.5-MoE-A2.7B, DeepSeek.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对混合专家模型的可解释性方法中，将观察性路由统计直接用于干预性剪枝决策的可靠性问题，本文对三个高冗余MoE架构进行token级干预审计。结果表明，基于利用率、激活范数和路由权重的常用剪枝指标可能不可靠，需要更严格的因果验证。该工作为高效MoE推理中的专家剪枝提供了重要指导。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对混合专家模型的可解释性方法中，将观察性路由统计直接用于干预性剪枝决策的可靠性问题，本文对三个高冗余MoE架构进行token级干预审计。结果表明，基于利用率、激活范数和路由权重的常用剪枝指标可能不可靠，需要更严格的因果验证。该工作为高效MoE推理中的专家剪枝提供了重要指导。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: efficient mixture of experts inference techniques

quick_skim.title: Flash-GMM: A Memory-Efficient Kernel for Scalable Soft Clustering
quick_skim.abstract: We present \textbf{Flash-GMM}, a fused Triton kernel for efficient computation of Gaussian Mixture Models (GMMs) over large-scale data in a single GPU pass. By eliminating the need to materialize the full responsibility matrix in GPU memory, Flash-GMM achieves a \textbf{20$\times$} speedup over existing implementations and enables training on datasets more than \textbf{100$\times$} larger than previously feasible on one device. To demonstrate its impact, we integrate Flash-GMM into the IVF coarse quantizer for approximate nearest-neighbor (ANN) search. We show that soft GMM clustering is now a viable drop-in replacement for $k$-means, and that GMM responsibilities can be leveraged to assign border vectors to multiple clusters. Our approach reaches fixed recall targets with up to $1.7\times$ fewer distance computations, or equivalently, yields $+2$--$12$ recall@10 at matched computational cost. We release the kernel as an open-source project.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: fused Triton kernel for efficient computation, transferable to group kernel optimization in MoE inference
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 融合Triton内核实现高效计算，可迁移至MoE推理中的分组内核优化
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 融合Triton内核实现高效计算，可迁移至MoE推理中的分组内核优化
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 融合Triton内核实现高效计算，可迁移至MoE推理中的分组内核优化
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Flash-GMM presents a fused Triton kernel for GMM clustering, achieving 20x speedup and enabling 100x larger datasets. The kernel fusion technique is directly applicable to group kernel optimization in MoE models.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对大规模高斯混合模型计算中完整责任矩阵的内存瓶颈，本文提出Flash-GMM融合Triton内核，在单次GPU传递中完成计算，避免实例化责任矩阵。该方法实现20倍加速并支持百倍更大数据集训练。其内核融合与内存优化思路可推广至混合专家模型的分组内核计算，为高效推理提供方法论支撑。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对大规模高斯混合模型计算中完整责任矩阵的内存瓶颈，本文提出Flash-GMM融合Triton内核，在单次GPU传递中完成计算，避免实例化责任矩阵。该方法实现20倍加速并支持百倍更大数据集训练。其内核融合与内存优化思路可推广至混合专家模型的分组内核计算，为高效推理提供方法论支撑。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: kernel fusion techniques for grouped expert computation in MoE
